mapper.sql: SELECT DISTINCT DATE(created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') AS day FROM sentence_corrections WHERE user_id = #{userId} UNION SELECT DISTINCT DATE(m.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') AS day FROM messages m JOIN conversations c ON m.conversation_id = c.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND m.role = 'USER' UNION SELECT DISTINCT DATE(created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') AS day FROM vocab_cards WHERE user_id = #{userId} UNION SELECT DISTINCT DATE(last_reviewed_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') AS day FROM vocab_cards WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND last_reviewed_at IS NOT NULL
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages m JOIN conversations c ON m.conversation_id = c.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND m.role = 'USER' AND m.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vocab_cards WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vocab_cards WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND last_reviewed_at IS NOT NULL AND DATE(last_reviewed_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') = CURRENT_DATE

WITH activity_days AS (
), ordered AS ( SELECT day FROM activity_days WHERE day <= CURRENT_DATE ), gaps AS ( SELECT day, day - LEAD(day) OVER (ORDER BY day DESC) AS gap FROM ordered ), runs AS ( SELECT day, SUM(CASE WHEN gap IS NULL OR gap <= 2 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) OVER (ORDER BY day DESC ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS grp FROM gaps ) SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT MAX(day) FROM ordered) >= CURRENT_DATE - 2 THEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM runs WHERE grp = 0) ELSE 0 END

WITH days AS ( SELECT generate_series( CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 days', CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1 day' )::date AS day ), corrections AS ( SELECT DATE(created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') AS day, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM sentence_corrections WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 days' GROUP BY 1 ), messages AS ( SELECT DATE(m.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') AS day, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM messages m JOIN conversations c ON m.conversation_id = c.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND m.role = 'USER' AND m.created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 days' GROUP BY 1 ) SELECT TO_CHAR(d.day, 'Dy') AS day, COALESCE(m.cnt, 0) + COALESCE(cor.cnt, 0) * 2 AS minutes, CASE WHEN COALESCE(m.cnt, 0) + COALESCE(cor.cnt, 0) > 0 THEN LEAST(100, 70 + COALESCE(cor.cnt, 0) * 5) ELSE 0 END AS accuracy FROM days d LEFT JOIN messages m ON m.day = d.day LEFT JOIN corrections cor ON cor.day = d.day ORDER BY d.day ASC
